close_reason: Created 5 core pipeline prompt modules: markdown structural validation (PRD 4.5), markdown voice validation (PRD 4.6), learning data extraction (PRD 4.7), freshness check (PRD 4.8), and HTML generation/regeneration. 193 tests, all 1427 pass.

title: Output generator prompt templates
description: Create prompt templates for all parallel output generators: alternates HTML, email subject generation, email preview text, social media post generation, social media captions, LinkedIn carousel generation, and LinkedIn carousel regeneration.
close_reason: Created prompt templates for all parallel output generators: email_subject.py (subject generation with separator format and recommendation), social_media.py (Phase 1 graphics-only posts, Phase 2 caption generation, feedback-driven regeneration), linkedin_carousel.py (post copy + carousel slides generation, feedback-driven regeneration). Note: alternates HTML has no LLM prompts (pure HTML templating), email preview/review already ported. 182 new tests, all 2291 pass.

title: Foundation & Infrastructure

title: Create pyproject.toml
description: Define project metadata, Python version requirements, and all dependency declarations for the application
close_reason: Updated pyproject.toml with all PRD 11.5 dependencies (FastAPI, uvicorn, gunicorn, LiteLLM, slack-bolt, SQLAlchemy[asyncio], asyncpg, Alembic, google-api-python-client, google-auth, httpx, APScheduler, pydantic-settings, Typer, Rich), dev tools (pytest-cov, ruff, mypy), tool configs, and CLI entry point. All 153 tests pass.

title: Create multi-stage Dockerfile with dev and prod targets
description:
Create Dockerfile with multi-stage build:
  dev target (hot reload, debug tools, volume mounts) and prod target (slim image, gunicorn/uvicorn, no dev deps). Base image python:3.12-slim.
close_reason: Created multi-stage Dockerfile with 4 stages (base, dev, builder, prod). Dev target has hot reload via uvicorn --reload; prod target uses gunicorn+uvicorn workers, non-root user, health check. Also created .dockerignore.

title: Create base docker-compose.yml with name: ica
description:
Create docker-compose.yml with 'name: ica' at top.
  Define services: app (FastAPI), postgres (PostgreSQL 16), redis (if needed for scheduler). Use env_file directive. This is the shared base — environment-specific
  overrides extend it.
close_reason: Created base docker-compose.yml with name: ica, defining app (FastAPI), postgres (PostgreSQL 16), and redis services with health checks and named volumes

title: Create docker-compose.dev.yml override
description:
Dev override: build with dev target, mount source as volume
  for hot reload, expose debug ports, set ENVIRONMENT=development, use .env.dev, postgres with exposed port for local access, relaxed resource limits.
close_reason: Created docker-compose.dev.yml with dev target, source volume mount for hot reload, debug port (5678), exposed postgres/redis ports, .env.dev, ENVIRONMENT=development

title: Create docker-compose.stage.yml override
description:
Staging override: build with prod target, set
  ENVIRONMENT=staging, use .env.stage, no source mounts, production-like resource limits, separate postgres credentials from prod.
close_reason: Created docker-compose.stage.yml with prod target, ENVIRONMENT=staging, .env.stage, separate postgres credentials (ica_stage/n8n_custom_data_stage), offset port 5433, resource limits on all services, no source mounts

title: Create docker-compose.prod.yml override
description:
Production override: build with prod target, set
  ENVIRONMENT=production, use .env.prod, restart: always, health checks, resource limits, no exposed postgres port, production logging config.
close_reason: Created docker-compose.prod.yml with prod target, restart: always, json-file log rotation, resource limits, no exposed postgres/redis ports

title: Create environment-specific .env files

Create .env.dev, .env.stage, .env.prod templates with all

close_reason: Created .env.example with all PRD 8.2 variables (POSTGRES_*, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, SLACK_*, GOOGLE_*, SEARCHAPI_API_KEY, TIMEZONE) with placeholder values. Updated .gitignore to ignore .env.* while keeping .env.example tracked.

close_reason: Created Makefile with targets: dev, stage, prod, build, down, logs, db-shell, ps, restart, clean, help. Default target is help.

title: Testing & Quality Assurance
description: Comprehensive test suite covering unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end pipeline validation

title: Unit Tests - Utilities
description: Unit tests for all utility functions: date formatter, relative date parser, theme body splitter, %marker parser (all article types), formatted_theme assembler, markdown section extractor, conditional output router, boolean normalizer.

title: Test MM/DD/YYYY date formatter
description: Verify date conversion handles various input formats and UTC edge cases
close_reason: Created 89 tests for format_date_mmddyyyy and parse_relative_date: basic formatting, structure, boundaries, all-months parametrized, days/weeks/sub-day parsing, case insensitivity, whitespace tolerance, fallback/invalid input, UTC edge cases, return types, and parse-then-format round-trip

title: Test relative date parser
description: Verify parsing of relative date strings and edge cases with various time units
close_reason: Added 56 edge-case tests for parse_relative_date: embedded text, multiple dates in string, zero/large values for all units, unusual whitespace (tab/newline), malformed patterns, non-string types, singular/plural forms, week/day equivalence, month boundary crossings. All 1000 tests pass.

title: Test theme body splitter
description: Verify splitting LLM output by separator produces correct theme blocks
close_reason: Added 83 edge-case tests for split_themes() in tests/test_utils/test_theme_splitter.py. Covers: basic splitting, RECOMMENDATION routing, ParsedThemeBlock field extraction, separator variations, empty/whitespace input, line endings, content preservation, return types, realistic LLM output patterns, RECOMMENDATION keyword edge cases, parametrized separator counting and name/description extraction.

title: Test %marker parser for all article types
description: Verify regex extraction of FA, M1, M2, Q1-Q3, I1-I2 markers with various LLM output formats
close_reason: Implemented marker parser (split_themes + parse_markers) with 101 tests covering all article types (FA, M1, M2, Q1-Q3, I1-I2), RV fields, edge cases, and LLM format variations

title: Test formatted_theme assembler
description: Verify structured JSON object is correctly assembled from parsed markers

title: Test markdown section extractor
description: Verify regex extraction between headings handles all section types and edge cases

title: Test conditional output router
description: Verify routing logic for all combinations of user choice, content validity, and feedback status
close_reason: Created conditional output router utility (ica/utils/output_router.py) with UserChoice enum, RouterResult dataclass, normalize_switch_value, and conditional_output_router function. Ported from n8n Conditional output Code node. 68 tests covering all 15 state combinations (switch_value x regen x validity). All 505 tests pass.

title: Test boolean normalizer
description: Verify conversion of yes, no, Yes, YES, true, false, empty string to correct booleans
close_reason: Created ica/utils/boolean_normalizer.py with normalize_boolean() that ports the n8n Field Mapping expression. Wrote 51 tests covering all task-specified values (yes/no/Yes/YES/true/false/empty), case variations, whitespace handling, bool passthrough, None, and return type guarantees.

title: Unit Tests - Validators
description: Unit tests for all validators: Quick Highlights char counting (150-190), Featured Article (P1 300-400, P2 300-400, Key Insight 300-370), Main Article (callout 180-250, content max 750), Industry Developments (200-280), Footer (200-550), LinkedIn slides (body 265-315, P1 120-150, P2 130-150), delta calculation accuracy, validation loop breaker (force-accept after 3).

title: Test Quick Highlights character counting
description: Verify bullet extraction, character counting, and delta calculation for 150-190 char range
close_reason: Implemented character_count.py validator module with Quick Highlights validation and 75 tests covering bullet extraction, character counting, delta calculation for 150-190 char range, edge cases

title: Test Featured Article character counting
description: Verify paragraph extraction and counting for P1 (300-400), P2 (300-400), Key Insight (300-370)
close_reason: Implemented validate_featured_article: strips subheading, removes CTA, splits paragraphs, validates P1 (300-400), P2 (300-400), Key Insight (300-370). 62 tests, all 693 pass.

title: Implement error handling patterns
description: Implement LLM error handling with Slack notification ('Execution Stopped at [step] due to [error]'), HTTP fetch error handling with fallback to manual Slack content entry, database error handling with upsert pattern, step-level error reporting to Slack, and graceful pipeline termination matching n8n's stopAndError behavior. See PRD Section 7.
close_reason: Implemented error handling module with exception hierarchy (PipelineError → LLMError, FetchError, DatabaseError, ValidationError, PipelineStopError), Slack error notification (both n8n templates), handle_step_error (notify + stop), and ValidationLoopCounter (max 3 attempts). 64 tests.

title: Implement structured logging
description: Add structured logging across all pipeline steps, service calls, and error conditions. Log pipeline state transitions: step start, step completion, validation attempts, user interactions.
close_reason: Implemented structured logging module with context vars, JSON/text formatters, configure_logging(), get_logger(), and bind_context(). Added LOG_LEVEL/LOG_FORMAT settings. 56 tests.

title: Summarization Pipeline Step
description: Port the Summarization subworkflow with per-article processing, LLM summarization, and feedback loop

title: Fetch LLM model config for summarization
description: Read LLM_SUMMARY_MODEL, LLM_SUMMARY_REGENERATION_MODEL, and LLM_SUMMARY_LEARNING_DATA_MODEL from config

title: Convert fetched HTML to markdown
description: Convert successfully fetched HTML content to markdown text, prepending URL and title for context

title: Fetch summarization learning data
description: Query last 40 entries from summarization_user_feedback ordered by created_at DESC

title: Aggregate feedback into prompt format
description: Combine feedback entries into bullet-point list format for injection into the summarization prompt

title: Call LLM with summarization prompt
description: Execute LLM completion with assembled prompt including article content and aggregated feedback context

title: Collect and aggregate all summaries
description: After processing all articles, collect individual results into a single array

title: Format summaries as Slack Block Kit
description: Build structured Slack message with numbered article summaries, URLs, bold labels, and dividers between sections

title: Share summaries in Slack channel
description: Send formatted article summaries to channel as non-blocking message

title: Send next-steps selection form
description: Send sendAndWait form with options: Yes / Provide Feedback / Restart Chat

title: Route user selection for summarization
description: Based on user's form response, route to: proceed, feedback collection, or restart

description: Send Slack free-text form asking user to provide feedback for content improvement

description: Get articles from Sheet filtered by approved=yes to reconcile with any manual edits made during approval

title: Call LLM for summarization regeneration
description: Execute LLM completion with original content and user feedback using LLM_SUMMARY_REGENERATION_MODEL

title: Extract learning data from summarization feedback
description: Call LLM with learning data extraction prompt using the user's feedback, original input, and model output

title: Store summarization learning feedback
description: Insert extracted learning data into summarization_user_feedback table

title: Implement summarization feedback loop
description: After storing feedback and regenerating, loop back to share updated summaries and ask for approval again

title: Build final summarized output
description: Parse final summaries into structured array with URL, Title, Summary, BusinessRelevance, order, newsletter_id, industry_news

title: Implement summarization conditional output
description: Determine whether to use original or regenerated summaries based on user choice and content validity

title: Implement summarization data preparation
description:
Fetch LLM model config, fetch approved articles from Google Sheet, normalize field types (approved/industry_news to boolean),
  build and execute SQL upsert into articles table (set type='curated'), create required tables. See PRD Section 3.2.
close_reason: Implemented summarization data preparation: SheetReader protocol, filter_approved_rows, normalize_article_row, upsert_curated_articles, prepare_summarization_data orchestrator. Added parse_date_mmddyyyy to date_parser. 69 new tests, all 1836 pass.

title: Implement per-article summarization loop
description:
Implement splitInBatches-style loop: for each article, fetch page content via HTTP with browser headers, detect fetch failures
  (error/captcha/YouTube) with manual Slack fallback, convert HTML to markdown, fetch learning data from notes table (last 40 where type='user_summarization'),
  aggregate feedback, call LLM with summarization prompt. See PRD Section 3.2.
close_reason: Implemented per-article summarization loop: HTTP fetching with browser headers, failure detection (error/captcha/YouTube), Slack manual fallback, HTML-to-text conversion, learning data fetch and aggregation, LLM call with summarization prompt, output parsing, sequential loop. 98 tests.

title: Implement summarization output and feedback
description:
Aggregate all summaries, format as Slack Block Kit, share in channel, send next-steps form (Yes/Feedback/Restart). Implement
  feedback loop: collect free-text feedback, call LLM for regeneration, extract learning data, store in notes table (type='user_summarization'), re-share. Build final
  summarized output with conditional routing. See PRD Section 3.2.
close_reason: Implemented summarization output formatting and feedback loop: format_summary_slack_text, build_summary_slack_blocks, build_next_steps_form, parse_next_steps_response, summaries_to_output_articles, call_regeneration_llm, extract_summary_learning_data, store_summarization_feedback, run_summarization_output orchestrator with feedback/restart loop. 98 tests.

Phase 2: filter selected posts, resolve source URLs from formatted_theme, call LLM to generate captions (150-300 chars each), share captions in Slack for review. Implement feedback loop. Create Google Doc with final posts. See PRD Section 3.8.

title: Implement markdown validation pipeline
description: Implement 3-layer validation: (1) Character count validation (code-based, not LLM) for all sections with exact ranges from PRD Section 3.4 and delta calculations. (2) Structural validation via LLM (PRD Section 4.5). (3) Voice validation via LLM (PRD Section 4.6). Merge all errors. Validation loop: max 3 attempts, feed errors back to LLM for targeted regeneration, force-accept after 3. See PRD Sections 3.4, 9.4.
close_reason: Absorbed into consolidated markdown generation tasks

title: Implement markdown user review flow
description: Share generated markdown in Slack (Block Kit format), send form (Yes/Feedback/Restart). On Yes: create Google Doc, insert content, share doc link, wait for user editing, proceed. On Feedback: collect, regenerate, extract learning data, store in DB, re-share. On Restart: loop back. Return Google Doc ID + formatted_theme + summaries. See PRD Section 3.4.
close_reason: Absorbed into consolidated markdown generation tasks

title: Email Subject & Preview Generator
description:
Implement complete email subject and preview generator (runs in parallel): fetch learning data from notes table
  (type='user_email_subject'), fetch newsletter document from Google Docs, call LLM to generate 3-5 subject lines with preview text, parse into selectable options,
  share in Slack with radio buttons, capture selection, implement feedback loop (store in notes with type='user_email_subject'), call LLM for email review generation,
  create Google Doc with final subject. See PRD Section 3.7.

title: Article Collection Utility
description:
Implement complete article collection utility: daily SearchApi queries (google_news engine) for 'AGI', 'Automation', 'AI' keywords,
  and every-2-day queries (default engine) for 'AI breakthrough', 'AI latest', 'AI tutorial', 'AI case study', 'AI research'. Deduplicate by URL, parse relative dates,
   upsert into articles table (set type='curated'). Create table if not exists. Wire as scheduled job. See PRD Sections 1.3, 2.1.

description: Define the daily keyword list: Artificial General Intelligence, Automation, Artificial Intelligence

title: Create bi-daily search keyword list
description: Define the bi-daily keyword list: AI breakthrough, AI latest, AI tutorial, AI case study, AI research

title: Implement google_news engine query execution
description: Execute SearchApi queries with google_news engine for each daily keyword with time_period=last_week, num=15, location=United States

title: Implement default engine query execution
description: Execute SearchApi queries with default engine for each bi-daily keyword with time_period=last_week, num=10

title: Implement result deduplication by URL
description: Deduplicate combined search results using URL as unique key, keeping first occurrence

title: Implement relative date parsing from results
description: Parse the date field from SearchApi results using relative date parser and format as MM/DD/YYYY

description: Insert articles into curated_articles table with ON CONFLICT (url) DO UPDATE for deduplication at the database level

title: Generalize table names

Refactor: rename database tables to generic names and add type discriminator fields. curated_articles → articles, newsletter_themes → themes,
  *_user_feedback → notes.

title: Rename curated_articles to articles
description: Rename curated_articles table to articles. Add a type column defaulting to 'curated'. Update all references (models, queries, migrations).
close_reason: Renamed CuratedArticle to Article, table curated_articles to articles, added type column with server_default='curated'. Updated models, crud, __init__, migration, pipeline code, tests, and CLAUDE.md. All 1767 tests pass.

title: Rename newsletter_themes to themes
description: Rename newsletter_themes table to themes. Add a type column defaulting to 'newsletter'. Update all references (models, queries, migrations).
close_reason: Renamed newsletter_themes table to themes, renamed NewsletterTheme class to Theme, added type column with server_default='newsletter'. Updated models, CRUD, migration, pipeline docstrings, db/__init__.py re-exports, and CLAUDE.md. All 1836 tests pass.

title: Consolidate user_feedback tables into notes
description:
Rename all *_user_feedback tables (summarization_user_feedback, newsletter_themes_user_feedback, markdowngenerator_user_feedback,
  htmlgenerator_user_feedback) into a single notes table. Add a type column set to the original prefix: user_summarization, user_newsletter_themes,
  user_markdowngenerator, user_htmlgenerator. Update all references (models, queries, migrations).
close_reason: Consolidated 5 feedback tables into single notes table with type discriminator
